title: Migration, Recovery, Longitudinal Validation, and Advanced Defense · Cumulative Product Review
summary: A delayed review reconstructs migration, recovery, longitudinal validation, and advanced defense from stakeholder, decision, assumption, revision, artifact, observation, changed case, rejected failure, repair, owner, and residual-risk evidence. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for advanced product transition and defense packet after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Choose parallel, phased, cohort, shadow, strangler, import, or big-bang transition from reversibility, compatibility, user burden, and risk.
Define recovery point and time needs, backup scope, integrity, encryption, access, retention, clean restore, and application reconciliation.
Measure task outcomes, guardrails, adoption, abandonment, support, accessibility, reliability, and unintended effects over an appropriate period.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# personal-project-2 cumulative independent product evidence portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic evidence-contract review only.
# They never contact participants or services, execute commands, deploy, or claim live conformance.
workspace: portfolio
project-id: personal-project-2
stakeholder: [replace with affected people and accountable decision owner]
decision: [replace with the decision this evidence changes]
problem-evidence: [replace with observed need, counterevidence, and uncertainty]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
security: [replace with threat, authorization, abuse, response, and residual risk]
privacy: [replace with purpose, minimization, retention, access, correction, and deletion]
test-strategy: [replace with behavior, changed case, fault, accessibility, security, and recovery]
release-evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, inventory, provenance, validation, and rollback]
recovery: [replace with backup, clean restore, reconciliation, communication, and ownership]
portfolio-proof: [replace with contribution, limitations, counterexample, and unseen defense]
transfer-boundary: authorized controlled research, toolchain, deployment, and review environments
evidence:

steps.title: Migration Strategy · changed case · Review Migration Strategy
steps.instruction:
review case — A big-bang cutover relies on one launch-day study and a backup job that has never produced a clean, reconciled restore. The review variation 3 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Choose parallel, phased, cohort, shadow, strangler, import, or big-bang transition from reversibility, compatibility, user burden, and risk.

Which action demonstrates Migration Strategy without dropping earlier contracts?

Evidence target: Migration Strategy · changed case · Review Migration Strategy.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for choose parallel, phased, cohort, shadow, strangler, import, or big-bang transition from reversibility, compatibility, user burden, and risk. For Migration Strategy · changed case · Review Migration Strategy, keep Migration Strategy connected to mechanically reviewable stakeholder, affected-user, artifact, changed-case, failure, repair, release, recovery, and transfer decision evidence.

content.text: A big-bang cutover relies on one launch-day study and a backup job that has never produced a clean, reconciled restore. The review variation 3 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Choose parallel, phased, cohort, shadow, strangler, import, or big-bang transition from reversibility, compatibility, user burden, and risk.

content.title: Commit before feedback
content.text: Choose from the stated data before opening the worked model. Record which Migration Strategy condition decided your prediction.

content.label: Authority to consult after committing
content.value: SPDX specification — Controls machine-readable software, package, file, snippet, licensing, security, build, and AI artifact relationships.

hints: For Migration Strategy · changed case · Review Migration Strategy, name the types, ownership, and stop path, Migration Strategy precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Migration Strategy · changed case · Review Migration Strategy, trace this concrete input and predict values, errors, blocking, and output before reviewing it: A big-bang cutover relies on one launch-day study and a backup job that has never produced a clean, reconciled restore. The review variation 3 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Choose parallel, phased, cohort, shadow, strangler, import, or big-bang transition from reversibility, compatibility, user burden, and risk.

For Migration Strategy · changed case · Review Migration Strategy, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: Big-bang migration is simplest because it avoids dual operation.

options.text: For migration strategy · changed case, apply Migration Strategy without its stated preconditions, omit the advanced product transition and defense packet trace and counterexample, and treat one plausible output as complete proof. This does not satisfy Migration Strategy for advanced product transition and defense packet.

Choose parallel, phased, cohort, shadow, strangler, import, or big-bang transition from reversibility, compatibility, user burden, and risk. Apply it to the stated input and retain a reproducible trace for advanced product transition and defense packet.
Big-bang migration is simplest because it avoids dual operation. That claim fails the migration strategy · changed case evidence boundary for Migration Strategy.

steps.title: Record what required effort · Review Advanced Retrospective
steps.instruction:

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Evaluate product, process, leadership, ethics, operations, and learning against prior predictions and define a harder transfer challenge.
